title: Treatment Guide: Early Blight
content:
Disease: Early Blight
Treatment Protocol: Apply copper-based fungicide every 7–10 days. Remove infected lower leaves. Improve air circulation.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Early Blight can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Late Blight
content:
Disease: Late Blight
Treatment Protocol: Apply mancozeb or chlorothalonil IMMEDIATELY. Destroy severely infected plants. Switch to drip irrigation.
Severity: High
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Late Blight can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Leaf Mold
content:
Disease: Leaf Mold
Treatment Protocol: Reduce humidity below 85%. Apply chlorothalonil. Ensure 24-hour dry periods between irrigations.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Leaf Mold can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Septoria Leaf Spot
content:
Disease: Septoria Leaf Spot
Treatment Protocol: Apply mancozeb or chlorothalonil. Avoid working in wet fields. Rotate crops next season.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Septoria Leaf Spot can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Gray Leaf Spot
content:
Disease: Gray Leaf Spot
Treatment Protocol: Apply strobilurin or triazole fungicide. Rotate crops annually. Use resistant hybrids.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Gray Leaf Spot can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Common Rust
content:
Disease: Common Rust
Treatment Protocol: Apply triazole fungicide early. Plant resistant varieties next season. Scout bi-weekly.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Common Rust can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Northern Leaf Blight
content:
Disease: Northern Leaf Blight
Treatment Protocol: Apply propiconazole or azoxystrobin. Improve drainage. Till under crop residue.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Northern Leaf Blight can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Yellow Rust
content:
Disease: Yellow Rust
Treatment Protocol: Apply propiconazole IMMEDIATELY (spreads fast in cool weather). Scout fields bi-weekly.
Severity: High
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Yellow Rust can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Brown Rust
content:
Disease: Brown Rust
Treatment Protocol: Apply tebuconazole. Monitor flag leaf closely. Maintain balanced N fertilisation.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Brown Rust can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Blast
content:
Disease: Blast
Treatment Protocol: Apply tricyclazole or azoxystrobin. Avoid excess nitrogen. Drain fields periodically.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Blast can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Bacterial Blight
content:
Disease: Bacterial Blight
Treatment Protocol: No effective chemical. Remove infected plants. Use resistant varieties next season.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Bacterial Blight can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Brown Spot
content:
Disease: Brown Spot
Treatment Protocol: Apply mancozeb or iprodione. Ensure balanced potassium. Avoid water stress.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Brown Spot can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Frogeye Leaf Spot
content:
Disease: Frogeye Leaf Spot
Treatment Protocol: Apply azoxystrobin or pyraclostrobin. Rotate crops with non-host plants.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Frogeye Leaf Spot can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Sudden Death Syndrome
content:
Disease: Sudden Death Syndrome
Treatment Protocol: No curative treatment. Improve drainage. Apply seed treatments next season.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Sudden Death Syndrome can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Verticillium Wilt
content:
Disease: Verticillium Wilt
Treatment Protocol: No chemical cure. Remove infected plants. Solarise soil. Use resistant varieties.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Verticillium Wilt can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Treatment Guide: Healthy
content:
Disease: Healthy
Treatment Protocol: No treatment needed. Scout every 5–7 days. Maintain balanced fertilisation.
Severity: Medium
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seeds, maintain field hygiene, scout regularly.
Economic Impact: Untreated Healthy can cause 20–80% yield loss.
Organic Option: Neem oil (5ml/L) + Trichoderma bio-agent as preventive spray.

title: Irrigation Guide: Tomato
content:
Tomato Irrigation Management:
Frequency: every 2–3 days
Water requirement: 25–30mm/week
Critical growth stage: flowering and fruit set
Deficit irrigation warning: Soil moisture below 40% field capacity triggers stress.
Excess water warning: Waterlogging >48h causes root hypoxia and disease susceptibility.
Drip irrigation saves 30–40% water and improves yield 15–25% vs flood irrigation.

title: Irrigation Guide: Potato
content:
Potato Irrigation Management:
Frequency: every 3–4 days
Water requirement: 20–25mm/week
Critical growth stage: tuber initiation
Deficit irrigation warning: Soil moisture below 40% field capacity triggers stress.
Excess water warning: Waterlogging >48h causes root hypoxia and disease susceptibility.
Drip irrigation saves 30–40% water and improves yield 15–25% vs flood irrigation.

title: Irrigation Guide: Rice
content:
Rice Irrigation Management:
Frequency: continuous flood
Water requirement: 1200–2000mm/season
Critical growth stage: tillering and heading
Deficit irrigation warning: Soil moisture below 40% field capacity triggers stress.
Excess water warning: Waterlogging >48h causes root hypoxia and disease susceptibility.
Drip irrigation saves 30–40% water and improves yield 15–25% vs flood irrigation.

title: Irrigation Guide: Wheat
content:
Wheat Irrigation Management:
Frequency: every 7–10 days
Water requirement: 450–650mm/season
Critical growth stage: jointing and grain fill
Deficit irrigation warning: Soil moisture below 40% field capacity triggers stress.
Excess water warning: Waterlogging >48h causes root hypoxia and disease susceptibility.
Drip irrigation saves 30–40% water and improves yield 15–25% vs flood irrigation.

title: Irrigation Guide: Corn
content:
Corn Irrigation Management:
Frequency: every 4–5 days
Water requirement: 500–800mm/season
Critical growth stage: silking and grain fill
Deficit irrigation warning: Soil moisture below 40% field capacity triggers stress.
Excess water warning: Waterlogging >48h causes root hypoxia and disease susceptibility.
Drip irrigation saves 30–40% water and improves yield 15–25% vs flood irrigation.

title: Irrigation Guide: Soybean
content:
Soybean Irrigation Management:
Frequency: every 5–7 days
Water requirement: 450–700mm/season
Critical growth stage: pod fill
Deficit irrigation warning: Soil moisture below 40% field capacity triggers stress.
Excess water warning: Waterlogging >48h causes root hypoxia and disease susceptibility.
Drip irrigation saves 30–40% water and improves yield 15–25% vs flood irrigation.

title: Irrigation Guide: Cotton
content:
Cotton Irrigation Management:
Frequency: every 7–10 days
Water requirement: 700–1300mm/season
Critical growth stage: boll development
Deficit irrigation warning: Soil moisture below 40% field capacity triggers stress.
Excess water warning: Waterlogging >48h causes root hypoxia and disease susceptibility.
Drip irrigation saves 30–40% water and improves yield 15–25% vs flood irrigation.

title: Tomato Market Timing Guide
content:
Tomato prices peak December–February (winter demand) and May–June (summer scarcity).
Avoid selling October–November when harvest glut drops prices 40–60%.
Cold storage extends shelf life 3–4 weeks; use to shift selling window.
Direct farm-to-hotel channel bypasses APMC 8% commission.
MSP reference: ₹600–800/quintal for processing grade.

title: General Crop Market Strategy
content:
Forward contracts with food processors lock in price 3–6 months ahead.
Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs) aggregate volume for better mandi bargaining.
eNAM (National Agriculture Market) gives pan-India price discovery — register free.
Value addition: Tomato→puree 3–5x, Potato→chips 8–10x, Cotton→handloom 2–3x.
Export windows: Basmati rice Aug–Nov. Soybean exports March–June.
